pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing hub that introduces the fitness app and exposes key interactive tools: weekly planner, calorie calculator, newsletter, and FAQ preview.
primary_functions: Introduce the app's benefits, core features, and key user outcomes
Provide quick access to Workouts, Live Classes, Pricing, FAQ, and My Plans via the main navigation
Allow users to build a weekly workout schedule via the Weekly Workout Planner section
Enable users to choose a specific week (e.g., 'Mon 4 – Sun 10') and add Strength, Cardio, or Yoga workouts under 45 minutes to specific days
Offer a Calorie & Macro Calculator where users can input age, weight, height, gender, activity level, and goal to calculate a daily calorie target
Allow users to email themselves the calculated calorie plan via an 'Email me this plan' form
Provide a newsletter sign-up section where users can set email, name, focus areas (e.g., Strength, Mobility/Flexibility), and frequency (e.g., 3 times per week)
Show a small FAQ preview section with links to the full FAQ page and visibility of the chat entry point

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor such as 'planner', 'calculator', or 'newsletter' to auto-scroll to a specific tool on the homepage.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary hero CTA such as 'See plans' or 'View pricing'.
Click 'Workouts' in the main navigation or workouts teaser button.
Click a CTA like 'Browse beginner home plans' in the workouts teaser section.
Click 'Live Classes' in the main navigation or live classes teaser button.
Click a teaser like 'See classes for tomorrow evening'.
Click 'View all FAQs' in the FAQ preview section.
Click 'My Plans' in the main navigation.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link and logo in the main header navigation.
Primary landing URL for marketing campaigns and direct traffic.

pages.name: Pricing
pages.description: Pricing overview for all subscription plans, supporting trials, billing toggles, and plan comparison flows that lead into trial signup or checkout.
primary_functions: Display subscription plans as cards with monthly prices, feature lists, and highlights such as 'Meal Plans' and '1:1 coaching sessions per month'
Provide a billing toggle to switch between Monthly and Annual pricing views
Allow users to identify the cheapest plan within a specific price range (e.g., $15–$25/month) that includes meal plans
Let users start a 14-day free trial on eligible plans via a 'Start 14-Day Free Trial' button that leads to the trial signup page
Allow users to open detailed plan views via 'Learn more' or by clicking on a plan card for deeper comparison

incoming_params.description: Optional initial billing period view, such as 'monthly' or 'annual', to pre-select the pricing toggle.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Start 14-Day Free Trial' on a plan card.
Click 'Learn more' or anywhere on a plan card to view full plan details.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Pricing' link in the main header navigation.
Linked from CTAs on Home, About, How It Works, and FAQ pages.
Optional 'billingPeriod' query parameter controls initial toggle state.

pages.name: Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific subscription plan used for comparison, confirming meal plans and coaching quantities, and starting checkout or trial flows.
primary_functions: Show full details for a selected subscription plan, including all features, limits, and number of 1:1 coaching sessions per month
Present price breakdown for monthly and annual billing so users can confirm annual pricing is under a target amount (e.g., $40/month equivalent)
Help users compare this plan against other key plans with brief side-by-side highlights
Allow users to proceed with the selected plan using a 'Continue with this plan' or 'Choose plan' button leading to the checkout page

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the SubscriptionPlan to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue with this plan' after selecting monthly or annual billing.
Click 'Start 14-Day Free Trial' from the plan detail page.
Click 'Back to all plans' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via a planId query parameter when a user selects a plan from the Pricing page or other CTAs.
Linked from plan cards and comparison tables.

pages.name: Trial Signup
pages.description: Form page to start a 14-day free trial for a selected plan, capturing basic user details and fitness goal.
primary_functions: Summarize the selected plan for which the 14-day free trial is being started, including price and key features such as meal plans
Collect essential trial information including Full Name, Email, and Primary fitness goal via input fields and a dropdown
Allow users to submit the trial request with a primary 'Start Free Trial' or 'Continue' button
Display a simple on-page confirmation message or next-steps guidance after successful submission

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the SubscriptionPlan for which the 14-day trial is being requested.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a post-submission CTA like 'Start planning your workouts' on the confirmation state.

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user clicks 'Start 14-Day Free Trial' on Pricing or Plan Detail, passing planId in the URL.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Simple plan confirmation page for proceeding with a selected paid plan, such as an annual subscription, before handing off to billing.
primary_functions: Display a summary of the chosen plan, emphasizing billing frequency (e.g., annual) and equivalent monthly price
Confirm that the selected plan meets user criteria (e.g., under $40/month, desired number of 1:1 coaching sessions)
Collect or confirm basic user details if needed (e.g., name, email) in a minimal form
Allow users to confirm and proceed with their chosen plan via a primary 'Continue' or 'Proceed' button

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the SubscriptionPlan selected for checkout; used for validation alongside the active checkout session.
Billing period context (e.g., 'annual' or 'monthly') to display appropriate pricing emphasis.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the primary 'Continue' or 'Proceed' button after confirming plan selection to return to Home and start using the app.

access_methods.description: Typically accessed after selecting 'Continue with this plan' on Plan Detail, with planId and billingPeriod in the URL.

pages.name: Workouts
pages.description: Discover and filter structured workout plans for different levels, equipment setups, locations, and weekly schedules.
primary_functions: List available workout plans as cards showing title, level, equipment, location/type, and sessions per week
Provide filters for Level (e.g., Beginner), Equipment (e.g., No equipment), Location/Type (e.g., Home), and Sessions per week (e.g., 3 sessions, 4+ sessions)
Allow users to select multiple session frequency options so only plans with at least a target number of sessions are included
Apply selected filters via an 'Apply filters' button and update the workout plan list accordingly
Provide links from each plan card to a detailed workout plan page

incoming_params.description: Optional initial equipment filter such as 'no_equipment' or 'dumbbells_only'.
Optional initial location filter like 'home', 'gym', or 'outdoor'.
Optional sessions-per-week preset such as '3' or '4_plus'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a workout plan card in the filtered results list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Workouts' link in the main header navigation.
Linked from Home workouts teaser and How It Works page.
Supports optional query parameters to pre-populate filters when deep-linked.

pages.name: Workout Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific workout plan, including weekly schedule, session durations, and the ability to save it to 'My Plans'.
primary_functions: Show a full description of the workout plan, including weekly structure, number of sessions per week, and typical session duration
Display key attributes such as level (e.g., Beginner), equipment requirements (e.g., No equipment), and location (e.g., Home)
Allow the user to save the plan via a button such as 'Save', 'Add to My Plan', or 'Try this plan'
Handle any optional preference or confirmation overlay when saving, allowing users to accept defaults and confirm
Confirm that the plan has been saved, and optionally link to the My Plans page

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the WorkoutPlan to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an optional 'View My Plans' button after successfully saving the workout plan.

access_methods.description: Accessed via workoutPlanId query parameter when a user selects a workout plan from the Workouts or My Plans pages.

pages.name: My Plans
pages.description: Dashboard of all workout plans the user has saved for easy access, management, and integration with the weekly planner.
primary_functions: Display a list of workout plans the user has saved or favorited, showing key details such as sessions per week
Allow users to click through to a saved plan's detail page for review or modification
Give users the ability to remove plans they no longer want to follow
Optionally let users mark a plan as active/current for reference in the Weekly Workout Planner

incoming_params.description: Optional SavedWorkoutPlan id to highlight when arriving from a just-saved plan.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved workout plan in the list.
Click a CTA like 'Plan this week' to jump into the Weekly Workout Planner on Home.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'My Plans' link in the main header navigation.
Optional 'highlightSavedId' parameter used to emphasize a newly saved plan.

pages.name: Live Classes
pages.description: Listing and discovery page for upcoming live fitness classes with filters for date, time, duration, rating, and type.
primary_functions: List upcoming live classes as cards showing title, time, duration, rating, and type (e.g., Strength, Cardio, Yoga)
Provide a date selector for choosing a specific day (including tomorrow’s date)
Offer filters for start time range (e.g., 6:00 PM – 10:00 PM), duration (e.g., 45 minutes or less), rating (e.g., 4.5+ stars), and possibly class category
Apply filter selections via an 'Apply filters' button to update the visible classes
Link from each class card to a detailed live class page for booking

incoming_params.description: Optional initial date to view classes for, in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a live class card in the filtered results list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Live Classes' link in the main header navigation.
Linked from Home live classes teaser and How It Works page.
Supports a 'date' query parameter to deep-link to classes for a particular day.

pages.name: Live Class Detail
pages.description: Detail page for one live class, showing schedule, instructor, and allowing the user to book a spot.
primary_functions: Display full details about the selected class including instructor, date, start time, duration, level, and rating
Confirm the class meets desired parameters (e.g., evening time, under 45 minutes, rating of 4.5+)
Provide a 'Book spot' or 'Reserve seat' button that reveals or scrolls to a booking form on the same page
Collect the user's name in a booking form and allow them to confirm via a 'Confirm booking' button
Show a booking confirmation summary once the reservation is completed

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the LiveClass to display and book.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all classes' link to return to the list for the same date.

access_methods.description: Accessed via liveClassId query parameter when a user selects a class from the Live Classes list.

pages.name: FAQ & Help
pages.description: Help center page with searchable FAQs, popular topics, and entry into live chat support for questions like pausing membership.
primary_functions: Provide a searchable FAQ list where users can type queries such as 'pause membership' into a search input
Allow users to expand specific FAQ questions, including those about pausing membership and impact on progress data
Offer a prominent 'Still need help?' or 'Chat with us' control that opens the chat widget for real-time assistance
Link to other helpful pages such as Contact, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy for more detailed information

incoming_params.description: Optional initial search query to pre-populate the FAQ search field (e.g., 'pause membership').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact support' link if FAQs do not resolve the issue.
Click a link like 'See full pause policy in Terms of Service'.
Click a link like 'Learn how your progress data is stored' within an FAQ answer.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'FAQ' link in the main header navigation.
Linked from the FAQ preview section on Home and from various support CTAs.
Supports a 'q' query parameter to deep-link into specific FAQ searches.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background and credibility page for the brand and training approach, including team bios and social proof.
primary_functions: Communicate the company mission, training philosophy, and what sets the app apart
Introduce key team members or coaches with brief bios and qualifications
Show social proof such as testimonials, partner logos, or success stories to build trust

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a CTA like 'View plans' after reading about the brand.
Click 'Explore workouts' in the training philosophy section.
Click 'See live classes' in a section highlighting coaching.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the main header navigation.
Accessible via the 'About' link in the footer navigation.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Central place to reach out to the team with questions or feedback via contact form or direct contact details.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for general inquiries or support requests
Display direct contact details such as support email and business address (if applicable)
Link to social media profiles or other communication channels

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected topic for the contact form such as 'billing', 'technical', or 'general'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View FAQ' link if the user wants to try self-service before or after submitting the form.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' link in the footer navigation.
Linked from FAQ and support-related messaging across the site.
Optional 'topic' query parameter sets the default topic in the contact form.

pages.name: How It Works
pages.description: Explainer page detailing how to use the app’s workouts, plans, live classes, and subscriptions together, including progress tracking and pause behavior.
primary_functions: Describe step-by-step how users can move from browsing workouts and live classes to saving plans and scheduling them
Clarify how trials, subscriptions, and plan upgrades work, including access to features like meal plans and coaching
Explain how progress is tracked and reassure users that pausing or changing plans does not lose their data
Provide links to relevant sections such as Pricing, Workouts, Live Classes, and FAQ for deeper exploration

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a CTA like 'Browse workout plans' in the step-by-step guide.
Click 'Find a live class' in the live classes explanation section.
Click 'See subscription options' in the trials and subscriptions section.
Click 'See all FAQs' in the progress tracking or pause explanation.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'How It Works' link in the footer navigation.
Linked from Home hero or onboarding CTAs like 'See how it works'.

pages.name: Terms of Service
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the app and subscription services, including billing, cancellations, and pause policies.
primary_functions: Present the terms and conditions of using the website and fitness app
Detail subscription rules, billing cycles, cancellations, and any pause policies
Clarify user responsibilities, acceptable use, and limitations of liability

incoming_params.description: Optional section id to scroll directly to a specific part of the Terms (e.g., 'subscription_and_pause_policies').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to help center' link at the bottom of the Terms page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Terms of Service' link in the footer navigation.
Supports a 'section' query parameter to deep-link to particular clauses.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information about data collection, storage, and privacy protections, including how progress data is retained when membership is paused.
primary_functions: Explain what personal data is collected through tools such as calculators, forms, and bookings
Describe how user data (including progress and preferences) is stored, protected, and used
State user rights regarding data access, correction, and deletion
Provide contact information or processes for privacy-related requests

incoming_params.description: Optional section id to scroll directly to a specific privacy topic (e.g., 'data_retention').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to FAQs' link after reading about privacy and data retention.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer navigation.
Supports a 'section' query parameter for deep-linking to specific privacy sections.

header_links.description: View and filter upcoming live classes
View subscription plans and start a trial
Access workout plans you have saved
Learn more about the brand and team

footer_links.description: Overview of how the app and plans work
